question:
Will Strømsgodset IF win on 2025-11-09?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 9, 2025
If Strømsgodset IF wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.eliteserien.no/

evidences.title: Eliteserien 2025 Table, Results, Stats and Fixtures
evidences.content: ## General Information ## About Eliteserien Founded in 1937, the Eliteserien is the top division of Norwegian football. It contains 16 teams. The season runs from April to November, and teams play each other both home and away to fulfil a total of 30 games. The Eliteserien has promotion and relegation linked to the OBOS-ligaen, the second tier. Two teams are relegated from the Eliteserien, and two teams are promoted from the OBOS-ligaen, each season, with another third position decided via a relegation/promotion play-off. Sixty-six different clubs have competed since its inception, with Rosenborg winning the most titles (26). The competition's all-time leading goalscorer is Sigurd Rushfeldt (172 goals). ## Top Stories (Trending) [...] ## Fixtures & Results Rosenborg BK clublogo Strømsgodset IF clublogo Viking FK clublogo Vålerenga Fotball clublogo SK Brann clublogo Hamarkameratene clublogo FK Bodø/Glimt clublogo Fredrikstad FK clublogo FK Haugesund clublogo Bryne FK clublogo Sandefjord Fotball clublogo KFUM-Kameratene Oslo clublogo Sarpsborg 08 FF clublogo Molde FK clublogo Kristiansund BK clublogo Tromsø IL clublogo ## General Information ## About Eliteserien [...] ## Top Score...
